# Trigonometry for navigation

## Short Teaching Summary
Trigonometry for navigation: Trigonometry is used in navigation (aviation and shipping) to determine locations and distances using angles. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
